title: Emojis
description: A really simple emoji mod that adds emojis visible by everyone to your chat!
body:
# Emojis

This mod is a fully client-side mods that allows you to type emojis in Minecraft in an easier way. The emojis are visible by everyone, even people without the mod, on any world/server.
You can write emojis in any text field:
- In the chat: Type `:` and commands-like suggestions will show up, it also supports auto-completion
- In any other text field: Type `:slug:` and it will be replaced with the emoji corresponding to the slug

## Emojis support

_By default, this mods support 1200+ emojis!_

Some examples:
- `:hamburger:` -> `🍔`
- `:shrug:` -> `¯\_(ツ)_/¯`

It also allows you to add any emoji or ASCII art you want through a command:

> /emojis add `slug` `emoji`

## Resource packs support

It also works with resource packs, which means custom fonts for the emojis, you can replace the boring white default emojis by colorful ones! You can find one made especially for this mod [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emojis-pack)
